highlights_headline: Preview 3.118.0 collected milestone 117 and 118 bumps and the Blazor/WASM fixes that shipped as 3.119.0.

bullets.detail: Bumps the bundled Skia to milestone 118, catching up two upstream releases.
The GRBackendRenderTarget Metal APIs are now available on every Apple platform.
Fixes .NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor issues, sets the WinUI SDK version explicitly, and moves the earlier Blazor workaround into WASM.
Updates freetype2, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo and HarfBuzz in the bundled Skia.

contributor_summaries.spouliot: Made the GRBackendRenderTarget Metal APIs available on every Apple platform.

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 opened the 3.118.0 line with the milestone 117 and 118 bumps.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 added the Metal render-target APIs everywhere, the Blazor/WASM plumbing fixes, and refreshed freetype, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo and HarfBuzz.

harfbuzz_summary: Refreshes HarfBuzz to 8.3.1 and picks up the WASM/Blazor plumbing fixes and the Android NDK r27c / 16 KB alignment update in the HarfBuzzSharp binding.
